text: None due to the short time taking drug. Headache first morning at 4AM that was relieved with Excedrin. Migraine headache with vomiting that lasted 14 hours. Couldn't go to work that day and stopped taking it. Not much to tell. I was just starting treatment with Klonopin and Abilify with the goal of stopping Klonopin in 30 days and then seeing how Abilify was working.
